questions: What are key ROI insights from Nielsen’s 2022 report?
How should budgets shift based on ROI differentials?
qa.answer: Channels show wide ROI variance; under‑invested channels (e.g., video) can be scaled profitably, while diminishing returns appear at high spend levels. Creative quality and full‑funnel balance are major ROI drivers.
implication: Use marginal ROI curves to reallocate budgets dynamically.
Invest in creative quality and format fit to unlock higher ROI.
Triangulate platform reads with MMM and experiments to validate shifts.
